Bash(python3 << 'PYTHON'
import re

# Read the ViewModel file
with open\("C:\\\\Users\\\\larde\\\\Documents\\\\Documents administratifs\\\\Scanfilm\\\\Technique\\\\ScriptRestore\\\\CleanScan\\\\ViewModels\\\\MainWindowViewModel.cs", "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Extract all language dictionaries
languages = {}
for lang_code in ["en", "fr", "de", "es"]:
    pattern = f'\\\\["{lang_code}"\\\\]\\\\s*=\\\\s*new\\\\\(StringComparer\\\\.OrdinalIgnoreCase\\\\\)\\\\s*{{\(.*?\)\\\\}},?\\\\s*\\\\[\\"'
    match = re.search\(pattern, content, re.DOTALL\)
    if match:
        dict_text = match.group\(1\)
        # Extract all keys
        keys = set\(re.findall\(r'\\\\[\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"\\\\]', dict_text\)\)
        languages[lang_code] = keys

# Find all Record/Batch/Overwrite/Shutdown keys
record_related = set\(\)
for lang_keys in languages.values\(\):
    record_related.update\([k for k in lang_keys if any\(x in k for x in ["Record", "Batch", "Overwrite", "Shutdown"]\)]\)

# Sort and check completeness
all_keys = sorted\(record_related\)
print\("All Record/Batch/Overwrite/Shutdown related keys:"\)
print\(\)
for key in all_keys:
    en_has = key in languages.get\("en", set\(\)\)
    fr_has = key in languages.get\("fr", set\(\)\)
    de_has = key in languages.get\("de", set\(\)\)
    es_has = key in languages.get\("es", set\(\)\)
    
    status = "✓" if all\([en_has, fr_has, de_has, es_has]\) else "MISSING"
    missing = []
    if not en_has: missing.append\("en"\)
    if not fr_has: missing.append\("fr"\)
    if not de_has: missing.append\("de"\)
    if not es_has: missing.append\("es"\)
    
    missing_str = f" \(missing in: {', '.join\(missing\)}\)" if missing else ""
    print\(f"{key:35} {status}{missing_str}"\)

PYTHON)
